title: Which Claw Should I Use? — A Decision Report
summary: Decision report ranking 13 standalone OpenClaw-family claws (incl. functional ones like Hermes) on a transparent composite (health, adoption, resilience, maturity, momentum). Winner: hermes-agent — robust across 6 weight profiles. Adds weight-sensitivity, Pareto-dominance & graph analysis, plus a per-claw 'where each shines' table.
